name: Marinated Pork Chops with Cilantro Salsa
recipeIngredient: 4 3/4-inch thick pork loin or rib chops
1 jalapeno chile, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. To grill pork chops, cover and grill them 5 to 6 inches from medium coals for 25 to 35 minutes, turning 3 or 4 times until done.
2. Trim fat from pork chops.
3. Place pork in a dish. Mix oil, lime juice, chile powder, and garlic; rub into both sides of pork, using the back of a spoon.
4. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour but no longer than 24 hours.
5. Prepare Cilantro-Mint Salsa by mixing all ingredients in a bowl. Cover and let stand at least 1 hour before serving.
6. Set oven control to broil. Sprinkle pork with salt and pepper.
7. Place pork on the rack in the broiler pan. Broil with tops 3 to 5 inches from heat for 8 to 11 minutes, turning once, until medium doneness (160 degrees).
8. Serve pork chops with Cilantro-Mint Salsa.
